name: AssetExclusion: Exclude DNS Name By IP
notes: Blacklists a DNS Name that has been associated with N different IPs over a given period of time.
conditions_text: when the event matches Has Identity is True
when any of Identity Host Name are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation DNS Whitelist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Asset Reconciliation DNS Blacklist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity Host Name and different Identity IP in 2 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity Host Name and different Identity IP in 2 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY AssetExclusion: Exclude DNS Name By IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Has Identity is True
AND NOT when any of Identity Host Name are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation DNS Whitelist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Asset Reconciliation DNS Blacklist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity Host Name and different Identity IP in 2 hour(s)
RED_list: Add the "identityHostName" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Asset Reconciliation DNS Blacklist"
